subject: [PATCH v5 4/6] fuse: support registered buffer pools in io-uring

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for registered buffer pools in io-uring, allowing servers to use a shared buffer pool that is also registered through io-uring. This eliminates the overhead of pinning and unpining user pages per I/O request, improving performance on write-intensive workloads. To use this feature, servers must set the FUSE_URING_REGISTERED_BUFPOOL flag when adding a bufpool and include the index of the registered buffer pool in every submitted sqe. The patch includes benchmark results showing improved throughput for direct writes using registered buffers.
